title: Reactive oxygen species assessment
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4nbmm","text":"The ROS measurements of the supernatant is performed by using DCF-DA, 2’,7’- dichlorofluorescein diacetate, a fluorescent probe for the assay. The formation of the oxidized fluorescent derivative (DCF) is monitored at excitation and emission wavelengths of 488 and 525 nm, respectively, in a fluorescent plate reader.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
